meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-06-15 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Short night: 5h19 (score 70) after bedtime slipped to 00:22 — deep fell to 45m and REM to 1h06. The underlying recovery markers still held: RHR 53, HRV 44 (+5 over the 7-day baseline of 39), stress a calm 17, only 4m awake. Two rest days had already banked recovery from Saturday's deadlift, but Body Battery recharged just 47 overnight. Treat today as easy — an optional Z2 swim at most — and aim to be in bed earlier tonight.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Kratka noć: 5h19 (ocjena 70) nakon što je odlazak na spavanje skliznuo na 00:22 — duboki san pao na 45m, REM na 1h06. Temeljni pokazatelji oporavka ipak su se održali: RHR 53, HRV 44 (+5 iznad 7-dnevne osnovice 39), stres miran 17, samo 4m budnosti. Dva dana odmora već su namirila oporavak od subotnjeg mrtvog dizanja, ali Body Battery se preko noći napunio tek 47. Neka danas bude lagano — najviše opcionalno Z2 plivanje — i lezi ranije večeras.
